name: io.github.TylerCoxDruin/geolabel
title: GeoLabel
description: Turn GPS coordinates into place name, category, and live opening hours via OpenStreetMap.

environmentVariables.name: GEOLABEL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your GeoLabel API key. Get one free at https://geolabel.dev

environmentVariables.name: GEOLABEL_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL (default https://api.geolabel.dev). Must use https:// except for http://localhost or http://127.0.0.1 for local development.
